title: Introduction to Hydrology
abstract: A short hands-on tour through reading a hydrograph, exploring CONUS streamflow, and computing TWI from a DEM. Built on the existing AI-Hydro example modules.

modules.title: Reading a hydrograph
modules.abstract: Anatomy of a hydrograph: baseflow, peak, recession.

modules.title: Exploring CONUS streamflow
modules.abstract: Pull USGS streamflow for a CONUS gauge, plot the regime, and spot a flood event.

modules.title: From DEM to TWI
modules.abstract: Compute the Topographic Wetness Index from a digital elevation model — your first piece of distributed hydrology.
